summary: MCP server entry now supports both stdio (default) and streamable HTTP (MCP_TRANSPORT=http, MCP_HTTP_ADDR=:8080).
reason: Cloud-hosted agents (Claude Desktop's remote install, Managed Agents, web clients) need HTTP transport to connect; stdio-only restricts the server to local installs. The dual-transport binary uses the same tool surface either way.
validated_outcome: `MCP_TRANSPORT=http MCP_HTTP_ADDR=:18080 pdok-location-pp-mcp` listens on /mcp and responds to JSON-RPC; stdio remains the default.
